{{Quote|THE LEGENDARY TAC-SPEC FOOTMAN DROID. PRODUCED AT ENORMOUS EXPENSE IN A LIMITED PRODUCTION RUN, MOST EXPERTS CONSIDER THE FOOTMEN THE DEADLIEST PERSONAL SERVICE UNITS EVER CREATED, COMBINING FANATICAL LOYALTY WITH A KILL RATIO THAT MAKES THE STATS OF MODERN-DAY ASSASSINS PALE IN COMPARISON.|''Peterson's Guide to Droids of the Republic'', Vol. VII: ''The Great Corporate Expansion Era''|<ref name="Yoda: Dark Rendezvous">''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''</ref>}}
The '''FIII Footman Droid''' was a highly-advanced model of combat and servant droid that was manufactured by the [[Tac-Spec Corporation]] for the [[House of Tund]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] several [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] prior to the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|Do you know what you're playing with, boy? This is a Tac-Spec Footman. ''Very'' dangerous. The hardware alone would retail for the cost of a small planet these days, for the right collector.|Asajj Ventress, to Whie Malreaux|<ref name="Yoda: Dark Rendezvous" />}}
They were programmed to be absolutely loyal to their buyers, along with protocol, assassin, bodyguard and soldier functions. They were also very upgradeable, and the two most well-known Footman droids, [[Fidelis]] and [[Solis]], were equipped with many rare and expensive tools and weapons throughout their operational history. They were also surprisingly strong, able to shatter limbs and even punch through a being's chest with relative ease and featured miniature rail cannons on the ends of their right arms. While not fighting, the droids worked as chefs, waiters, and chauffeurs.

==History==
{{Quote|I am programmed for absolute loyalty to the House of Malreaux which I have served through madness and war for twelve generations.|Fidelis, Tac-Spec Footman droid from Vjun|<ref name="Yoda: Dark Rendezvous" />}}
The footman droid Fidelis served the [[House Malreaux]] on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] for twelve generations, until he and Solis were destroyed beneath the Malreaux castle in a standoff with [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] while on mission with Yoda and [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Fidelis proudly wore the Malreaux checkerboard of ivory and blood on his torso, with blood piping marks on his limbs.
